copy.direct: Name 5 things you can see, 4 you can touch, 3 you can hear, 2 you can smell, 1 you can taste.
copy.reflective: Your senses are anchors to the present. Use them to find your way back.

why_it_works: The 5-4-3-2-1 technique grounds you in sensory reality, interrupting anxiety spirals within 60 seconds.
